## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy updates, and product integration.](https://fathom.video/share/NgUX3jhSV-LSkjLHHUecKEMueP73pMHH?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impressive growth: 30% increase in impressions over 20 days, 47% jump in clicks week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/NgUX3jhSV-LSkjLHHUecKEMueP73pMHH?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Discern experiencing strong month: 28% growth over past 30 days, 10-15 monthly customers from Stripe Atlas partnership](https://fathom.video/share/NgUX3jhSV-LSkjLHHUecKEMueP73pMHH?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Content strategy evolving: focus on franchise tax articles, foreign registration, and maintaining product link integrity](https://fathom.video/share/NgUX3jhSV-LSkjLHHUecKEMueP73pMHH?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
